_izoh: Bu faylni tahrirlash uchun deploy KERAK EMAS — Vagent har so'rovda yangilanishni o'zi ko'radi. Yangi model qo'shish: pricing + hints ga yozish kifoya.

hints.gemini-omni: Video TAHRIRLASH: obyekt qo'shish/olib tashlash, restayl, fon almashtirish, mahsulot joylashtirish. Natija manba videoga (nisbat/uzunlik) ergashadi.
hints.nano-banana-2: Tez va arzon rasm. Sketch, qoralama, g'oya sinovi.
hints.gpt-image-2: Yuqori sifat, matn/logo aniq. Poster, reklama, taklifnoma.
hints.seedance-2.0: Eng kuchli video. Multi-referens (@image1 @video1 @audio1), motion transfer.

orchestration._izoh: Claude (Sonnet) orkestratsiya token→tanga hisobi. enabled=false = KILL-SWITCH (deploysiz o'chirish). price_per_m: Sonnet 4.6 standart narx ($/1M token). Kunlik bepul: 1000 mc = 1 tanga.
